q: In uniform circular motion, the centripetal force and centripetal acceleration are _______ direction. 2024

_______ is used to measure and regulate the speed of a machine. 2025
Centrifugal force acts radially _______ the centre of the circle. 2025
When a car in motion takes a sudden turn in a curved path, passengers in the car experience an outward push due to the _______ force acting on them. 2025

A satellite orbiting a planet is supported by the _______ force. 2025
An attractive force exists between the sun and the earth in a direction _______ to the path of the earth. 2026
An object of mass 2 kg moves in a circle with radius 0.5 m at constant speed of $3	ext{ms}^{-1}$. The net force directed toward the center is _______ N. 2026
